name: Orange People Golf
about: Orange People Golf is a multi-sport venue located in Orange County, California, featuring both a main studio in Irvine and a dedicated screen golf studio in Tustin. The facility offers a unique combination of Reformer and Flying Pilates classes alongside screen golf technology. The golf studio is equipped with high-speed camera sensors that capture detailed swing data, including ball speed, launch angle, and spin RPM. Pricing options include hourly practice rates, monthly passes, and private golf lessons, with a minimum booking requirement of one hour. The venue appears to cater to both fitness and golf enthusiasts, providing a modern, technologically-driven environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Ultra high-speed camera sensors (1900 frames/sec) provide precise swing data analysis
Specialized marked golf balls allow for accurate spin and spin axis measurement without blind spots
Variety of pricing options including hourly rates and multi-month passes
Dedicated private golf lessons with various professional instructors

simulator_hardware.notes: Powered by KAKAO VX, featuring two 1900 frames/sec ultra high-speed camera sensors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services on-site, and no BYOB policy is specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on typical playing times for 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information regarding child-friendly features or services is mentioned on the website.
